risk_if_not_implemented: Without Unique System-Generated Session Identifiers, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Transmission Integrity
compensating_control_1.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the integrity of data being transmitted.
compensating_control_1.justification: Transmission Integrity (CRY-04) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Unique System-Generated Session Identifiers (NET-09.2) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Session Integrity
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to protect the authenticity and integrity of communications sessions.
compensating_control_2.justification: Session Integrity (NET-09) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Unique System-Generated Session Identifiers (NET-09.2) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
